// About Me

Crafting Intelligence from Data

I'm Ramya, a passionate Computer Science Engineering student from Lovely Professional University with a deep interest for building intelligent, elegant, and impactful software. My journey into programming sparked a curiosity that hasn't stopped evolving.

My core expertise lies in Java development — from designing robust backend logic to crafting responsive, modern UIs. I am Highly Motivated to Build Scalable and Production Ready Applications that Deliver Real World Impact.

Currently, I'm sharpening my skills in Data Structures & Algorithms, exploring AI-powered application development, and building projects that sit at the intersection of innovation and practicality.

Java Dev DSA AI Apps Problem Solver Fast Learner

University Management System
JavaOOPJDBCMySQL
A full-featured desktop application built with Java and Object-Oriented principles. Features include student enrollment management, faculty scheduling, grade computation, course catalog management, and report generation. Leverages JDBC for database connectivity with MySQL for persistent storage.
View on GitHub
[ SATELLITE IMAGE ANALYSIS ]
Automated Road Extraction using Satellite Images
PythonXGBoostMLNumPyPandas
A machine learning project that leverages XGBoost and image processing techniques to automatically detect and extract road networks from satellite imagery. The pipeline includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and post-processing for high-accuracy road segmentation with applications in GIS and urban planning.
View on GitHub
Vocabulary Builder Web App
HTMLCSSJavaScriptREST API
A beautifully designed web application for vocabulary enhancement. Users get a daily word, can search definitions via Dictionary API, save favorites, take vocabulary quizzes, and track progress. Built with vanilla JavaScript for performance with a modern, responsive interface.
